title: Oppressed shareholder's remedies
doc_html:
§908. Oppressed shareholder's remedies

            The provisions of R.S. 6:518 shall be applicable to savings and loan holding companies and their subsidiaries insured by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation.

            Acts 2022, No. 261, §1.
doc_text:
§908.  Oppressed shareholder's remedies
The provisions of R.S. 6:518 shall be applicable to savings and loan holding
companies and their subsidiaries insured by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation.
Acts 2022, No. 261, §1.
